workflow.task: Create premium UGC videos for Glow Restore Serum targeting women aged 25 to 40 in the United Arab Emirates.
workflow_notes: Client-facing output must remain white-label safe.
Premium quality gate required before client delivery.

approval.reason: This action is allowed to run autonomously.

execution.message: Execution request passed governance, quality checks, and adapter preparation.

adapter_result.message: UGC video provider adapter prepared through provider orchestrator.
next_steps: Map creator profile, language, voice, and video quality parameters.
Add provider API credentials through secure environment variables.
Run safe test generation before enabling client delivery.

provider_route.message: Provider route prepared. Real provider credentials/API connection not enabled yet.
quality_requirements: Provider API or controlled automation path

output.content: Create a premium, realistic, commercially usable TikTok, Meta Reels, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts UGC video for Glow Restore Serum, a skincare product. The creator should match this profile: 25-40, female, region-appropriate and campaign-selectable, speaking Arabic with a United Arab Emirates appropriate accent. The content must feel native to United Arab Emirates, culturally appropriate, brand-safe, commercially believable, and relevant to Women aged 25 to 40 in United Arab Emirates. The delivery should be natural, premium, trustworthy, emotionally believable, conversational, and not over-scripted.

ugc_prompt.target_audience: Women aged 25 to 40 in United Arab Emirates
ugc_prompt.platform: TikTok, Meta Reels, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts
ugc_prompt.production_brief: Create a premium, realistic, commercially usable TikTok, Meta Reels, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts UGC video for Glow Restore Serum, a skincare product. The creator should match this profile: 25-40, female, region-appropriate and campaign-selectable, speaking Arabic with a United Arab Emirates appropriate accent. The content must feel native to United Arab Emirates, culturally appropriate, brand-safe, commercially believable, and relevant to Women aged 25 to 40 in United Arab Emirates. The delivery should be natural, premium, trustworthy, emotionally believable, conversational, and not over-scripted.

shot_plan.direction: Immediate audience pain point or curiosity trigger.
Show realistic lifestyle problem or desire.
Natural creator-led product demonstration.
Demonstrate believable product value or transformation.
Reduce buyer hesitation naturally.
Encourage action without aggressive selling.

video_quality_requirements: No lag between audio and mouth movement
quality_rejection_rules: Reject lag between speech and mouth movement
